phrases.intent_en: Ask for one adult ticket to the museum
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais un billet adulte pour le musée, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DRAY un bee-YAY ah-DYLT poor luh myoo-ZAY seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée des Augustins is housed in a 14th-century Augustinian convent and holds one of France's finest collections of Romanesque and Gothic sculpture.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the medieval sculpture collection is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la collection de sculptures médiévales ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah koh-lek-SYON duh skoolp-TYOOR may-dyay-VAL
phrases.cultural_note: The museum's Romanesque capitals salvaged from demolished churches are considered among the most important in southern France.

responses.english: On the ground floor, in the cloister.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Gothic cloister garden is accessible
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que le jardin du cloître gothique est accessible ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh luh zhar-DAN doo KLWAH-truh goh-TEEK eh ak-ses-SEEBL
phrases.cultural_note: The museum's two Gothic and Romanesque cloisters are peaceful spaces that can be visited as part of the general admission.

responses.english: Yes, it is accessible from the main room.
responses.phonetic: wee eel eh tak-ses-EEBL duh-PWEE lah SAHL prahn-see-PAHL
responses.french: Oui, il est accessible depuis la salle principale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a children's activity sheet
phrases.text_local: Avez-vous des fiches d'activités pour les enfants ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah-VAY-voo day FEESH dak-tee-vee-TAY poor lay-ZAHNG-fahn
phrases.cultural_note: Many French museums offer free activity sheets (fiches pédagogiques) to help children engage with the collections.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the café in the cloister is open
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que le café dans le cloître est ouvert ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh luh kah-FAY dahn luh KLWAH-truh eh oo-VAIR
phrases.cultural_note: The café set in the old cloister of the Augustins is a tranquil retreat in the heart of the city.

responses.phonetic: wee dahn luh zhar-DAHN doo KLWAT-ruh
responses.french: Oui, dans le jardin du cloître.
